race.description: Happy 80th Birthday Geoffrey Conaghan Mdn Hcp
race.comment: The well-related SWING STATE (4) (half to G2 winner In Good Order) has hit the top-four at his past four starts and looks to be knocking on the door of a maiden victory. Ready to peak now third-up from the break and must be respected out of the Freedman camp. Goes on top. SECRET FENKEL (2) has gotten better with each run including a close-up second in town when resuming. Strips fitter and is perfectly placed to break through. VAN GHOST (1) just ran into one better at the Sunny Coast on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that day at the races. Right in this contest. SHOW'EM WHO'S KING (6) was well in the market on debut and where there's smoke there's fire. One for the multiples. LIGHTS WILL GUIDE (8) rounds out the selections.
